'''Soonis''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who single-handedly defeated a vicious, mysterious group of raiders in the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="Outlaw Battle Armor" />
